# SynxisNom Skill Manifest

## Purpose

Resolve SynXis nomenclature questions using the minimum reference set.

## Boundaries

- In scope: domain IDs, app IDs, app aliases, service tiers, service descriptions, naming conventions, solution file mapping, search-term expansion for downstream discovery.
- Out of scope: coding standards review, OHIP implementation details, tax logic.

## Primary Files by Concern

- Discovery dictionary: `SYNXIS_SERVICE_DISCOVERY_DICTIONARY.md`
- Overview: `SYNXIS_NOMENCLATURE_OVERVIEW.md`
- App registry: `SYNXIS_APP_ID_REGISTRY.md`
- Solution map: `SYNXIS_SOLUTION_FILE_MAP.md`

## Loading Objective

Start with the smallest useful route: discovery dictionary, overview, app lookup, or solution mapping.
